details.safeProbe: Use the parity request against gid://shopify/Order/0 first so Shopify returns validation/userErrors without closing a merchant order.
details.localStagingCandidate: Can be locally staged after fixture-backed semantics by updating local order closed/read-after-write status only.

notes: Planned lifecycle parity for `orderClose`. This root is not locally supported yet; it remains an explicit unsupported passthrough registry entry until live validation and happy-path close/open semantics are captured.
